conservative.name: Improved Bless Weapon
conservative.requirements: 6 favour, Willpower 4+, Weapon Skill trained, and engaged with target weapon

success.description: As above, and when is spent to enhance the dice pool of attacks with the affected weapon, it adds rather than

boon.description: Effect: Myrmidia blesses your weapon. While this blessing is recharging, the weapon is considered an enchanted and blessed item of superior quality and adds to the dice pool. It gains the Pierce 2 and Vicious qualities. Attack with the affected weapon gain " +1 critical"
While this blessing is recharging, the weapon's wielder may make a single Assist manoeuvre for free on each of his turns

reckless.name: Improved Bless Weapon
reckless.requirements: 6 favour, Willpower 4+, Weapon Skill trained, and engaged with target weapon

success.description: As above, and when is spent to enhance the dice pool of attacks with the affected weapon, it adds rather than

boon.description: Effect: Myrmidia blesses your weapon. While this blessing is recharging, the weapon is considered an enchanted and blessed item of superior quality and adds to the dice pool. It gains the Pierce 2 and Vicious qualities. Attack with the affected weapon gain " +1 critical"
The bearer of the weapon gains the Inspired condition while this blessing is recharging
